questions.q: A large-scale study of U.S. youth tracking over 11,000 children found that starting the use of what substance during teenage years is linked to measurably slower cognitive development and impaired memory?
According to newly published research, patients who view their depression or anxiety as a result of what specific cause tend to use antidepressants for much longer periods?
An analysis of 6.14 million health records found an increased risk of autism in children whose mothers were prescribed medications that inhibit the synthesis of what substance during pregnancy?

A new study on political bias and conspiracy thinking found that almost 80% of highly conspiratorial Republicans endorsed a theory blaming Democratic operatives for a 2024 assassination attempt against whom?
A recent study of 16,000 patients revealed a 100% increase in drug poisoning hospitalization risk when gabapentinoids are taken alongside what other class of medications?
